title: Protocol Neutrality
description: Protocol neutrality means consensus and relay rules should avoid embedding special treatment for particular users or outcomes. Neutral rule design is a core part of Bitcoin’s credible fairness.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Philosophy: Neutrality
resources.notes: Why neutral policy and consensus boundaries matter.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Philosophy: Decentralization
resources.notes: How neutrality and decentralization reinforce each other.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Consensus-rule perspective needed to evaluate neutrality tradeoffs.

resources.title: Bitcoin Development Philosophy
resources.notes: Directly aligned with neutrality as a design goal and cultural constraint in Bitcoin development.
